title: MaceSMP
description: Have you every wanted to have different textures for the Mace? Well this pack solves those problems. Using custom model data you can get six different textures.
body:
# This is the official MaceSMP resuorce pack.
 
This texture pack if for the members of private Mace SMP where there is also a plugin to accompany the texture pack, you may not use this pack if you are playing on the Public Mace SMP server. The pack will not impact the normal textures of items it will only change textures if you use custom model data. The pack should not impact your game at all or it might decrese performace by a very small amount.

# 📜 Contents
### Maces:
  * BloodMace ![BloodMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78af2ac0b53a0ed2c3e2707cf3cb8b16bb22450c.png)
  * FrostMace![FrostMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeb1c32f714a8867207a33dc3df024289abfd2ca.png)
  * SculkMace![SculkMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/216d6b90c1a3993477a9a5fb2a8f8f4c3cac6ba1.png)
  * LightMace![LightMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e07481792d0dca7e198b1905409d1054c9359d1e.png)
  * ShadowMace![ShadowMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/562f14dd74685857508f2e5bd3580c6c19a87651_0.webp)
  * DragonMace![DragonMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81651cf3d1fd3b081327c926cf0adf7efae18368.png)
# ⭐ How to install

**Note that this pack is only for 1.21.1**\
To install this resource pack you first need to download it, which can be done by downloading the file (here in modrinth). After downloading the file you need to open Minecraft, once you have Minecraft open navigate to the resource pack menu, which can be done by pressing ESC --> options --> resource packs --> Open pack folder, in-game. And you can also do the same in the main menu. If you do not want to open Minecraft to do this you can write %appdata% in your computer search bar, which will open a folder. Then navigate to .minecraft, then to resource packs. Drag the file you downloaded into this folder. Re-open the resource pack menu inside the game, and then hover over the pack and press the arrow pointing to the right. Finally, open a single-player or multiplayer world and it will work. Though you do need to give yourself a mace with custom model data for it to change the texture, how to do so is below.

# 🪧 Ussage

To use the pack you need to run the command: "/give {player} mace[minecraft:custom_model_data={number}]" Replace {player} with the name of the player you want to give the mace to, or if you know how to use commands the target entities/entity.\
For the {number} this is the custom model data of the Mace, for the differnt textures refer to the table bellow to find which number you shoudl use for the texture you want.

| Name                | Number                | 
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| BloodMace           | 1                     |
| FrostMace           | 2                     | 
| SculkMace           | 3                     | 
| LightMace           | 4                     |
| ShadowMace          | 5                     | 
| DragonMace          | 6                     | 

# ❓ Why should you get it?

If you are in the Mace SMP private server, the pack is required to allow you to see the Maces, it also adds to the content when you have the custom textures. If you are not in the private server, this pack can give you multiple differnt textures for the normal mace. While you do need to have acces to commands to use it, it does enchance the game by allowing you to be able to use more exicting textures. In this pack there are six textures, seven including the orginal for the mace. You can try them all out and have fun with them, the choices are up to you!

# 🔗 Links
